nodes.recentposition: HR & Recruitment Intern at Greenhouse Agency in Irvine, CA
nodes.involvements: Student Assistant at Paul Merage, HRMA at UCI
nodes.bios: Greetings! My name is Tiffany Than and I initiated in my fall quarter of my first year here at UCI. In my free time I enjoy exploring new eateries, making Spotify playlists, and seeing live concerts! A fun fact about myself is that I named my car Adeline. Ask me about music, my first year experiences, or anything at recruitment!
